calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
J. Harmond Hughey, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Mario Flores, also present.
No appearance by the Defendant: Simon Fainsilber.
Ananda Norris, Esq. special appearance for Mr. Ian Kelley, Esq.-Defendant's Counsel.
Parties settled, terms not read into the record.
Stipulation For Entry of Future Judgment Upon Breach filed in court.
Matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2005 Advanced From Sep-08-05 To Aug-26-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2005 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
J. Harmond Hughey, Esq., 415-573-9515 for plaintiff and opposing party Mario Flores

RULING:
A R G U E D and the court modified its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SIMON FAINSILBER'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Plaintiff has 5 days to amend his complaint. Order signed. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/AC)
